age.Description: Age of the participant at time of testing

group.Description: Study group assignment. Twin pair classification.

Levels.PR: Proband Pair - Twin pair includes one diagnosed individual with schizophrenia and one undiagnosed individual
Levels.HC: Healthy Control - Twin pair with no history of schizophrenia

twin_type_ab.Description: Twin pair designation within a twin set (e.g., 'a' or 'b')

clinical_group (Pr0/HP1/HC2).Description: Individual clinical classification: 0 = Proband (Pr), 1 = Healthy Pair (HP), 2 = Healthy Control (HC)

Levels.1: Healthy Pair (HP) - co-twin of a diagnosed proband, no diagnosis
Levels.2: Healthy Control (HC) - twin from a pair with no diagnosis of schizophrenia
